prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南京农业大学在河北省物理类最低录取位次分别为约21718→25895→28891→31080→36180名，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约14462名，2025年基准 位次约36180名，后移幅度逐年加大；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年206人、2022年209人、2023年214人、2024年228人、2025年236人，逐年小幅扩招；20 26年计划增至262人（较2025年增加26人，增幅约11%），扩招幅度明显加大，将导致竞争进一步加剧、位次继续后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高 校；软科中国大学排名2021年第52名、2022年第49名、2023年第51名、2024年第49名、2025年第53名、2026年第55名，近年排名略有波动但整体稳定在50名左右，属于中上层次21 1院校；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合，涉及图书馆表白墙事件但影响有限；抖音综合热度排名第102位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量较低；近年未见明显 投档断档或录取异常记录，报考心理较为平稳；第五轮学科评估中，作物学A+、植物保护A+、食品科学与工程A、兽医学A-、畜牧学A-，农林学科实力突出，与 招生专业中的农学、植物保护、食品科学与工程类、动物医学类等高度对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工 科专业社会热度持续偏高，而农林类相关专业（如农学、植物保护、园艺等）社会热度相对平稳偏冷；河北省2026年高考报名总人数约609800人，较2025年（约606754人）增加约 3000人，其中物理类考生按近年占比估算约364660人，较2025年物理类363040人略有增加，竞争略有加剧；省控线方面，物理类本科批从2021年412分持续上升至2025年459分，反 映整体竞争强度上升；南京农业大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角地区，对河北省考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在河北省物理类招生计划占比较大（2025年236 人），属于该校在省外的主要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（+11%）、河北省考生总数小幅增加、省控线持续上升等因 素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次将继续后移。在2025年基准36180名基础上，扩招效应主导位次后移，但考生增加幅度有限、学校层次稳定、声誉中性，后移幅度略低于纯供 需模型估算值。预测2026年最低位次约38522名，区间38022–39022名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nanjing Agricultural University in Hebei Province Physics Category were approximately 21718 → 25895 → 28891 → 31080 → 36180, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 14462 places in the past 4 years. The 2025 baseline ranking is about 36180, with the backward shift magnitude increasing year by year. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 206 in 2021, 209 in 2022, 214 in 2023, 228 in 2024, and 236 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion. The 2026 plan increases to 262 (an increase of 26 from 2025, about 11%), with a significantly larger expansion rate, which will further intensify competition and continue the backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 52nd in 2021, 49th in 2022, 51st in 2023, 49th in 2024, 53rd in 2025, and 55th in 2026, with slight fluctuations but overall stability around 50th, placing it in the mid-to-upper tier of 211 universities. The 2023 reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, involving a library confession wall incident but with limited impact. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 102nd, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms. No significant admission gaps or abnormal admission records have been observed in recent years, and the application psychology is relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science and Plant Protection received A+, Food Science and Engineering received A, Veterinary Medicine and Animal Science received A-, highlighting strong agricultural and forestry disciplines, which correspond well with the university's majors such as Agriculture, Plant Protection, Food Science and Engineering, and Animal Medicine, attracting some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remains high, while agricultural and forestry-related majors (e.g., Agriculture, Plant Protection, Horticulture) are relatively stable but cooler. The total number of Hebei Province Gaokao registrants in 2026 is about 609,800, an increase of about 3,000 from 2025 (about 606,754). Among them, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 364,660 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 363,040 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, reflecting overall increased competition. Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal to Hebei candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province Physics Category accounts for a significant proportion (236 in 2025), making Hebei one of its main source provinces outside Jiangsu.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+11%), a slight increase in the total number of Hebei candidates, and the rising provincial control line, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward. Based on the 2025 baseline of 36180, the expansion effect dominates the backward shift, but the limited increase in candidates, stable university level, and neutral reputation result in a slightly smaller backward shift than estimated by a pure supply-demand model. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 38522, with a range of 38022–39022.

- Data Science and Big Data Technology

- Accounting.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Agriculture
- Plant Protection
- Animal Medicine
- Horticulture
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Public Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 38022–39022, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Agriculture, Plant Protection, Animal Medicine, etc., which are flagship disciplines) as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (below 38022), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors; for rankings near the upper bound (around 39022), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 advantageous disciplines (A+ discipline-related majors) while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南京农业大学在河北省历史类最低录取位次分别为约2907→3155→5049→4021→4170名，2023年出现明显后移（5049名），2024–2025年有所回稳但仍在4 000名以上，2025年基准约4170名；该校在河北省历史类招生计划2021年38人、2022年41人、2023年41人、2024年37人、2025年46人；2026年计划减至40人（较2 025年减少6人，降幅约13%），缩招幅度较大，将导致竞争略有缓解、位次可能前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第55名，近年排名稳定在50名左右，属于中上层 次211院校；近年声誉平稳中性；抖音热度一般（排名第102位）；未见明显投档断档记录；作物学A+、植物保护A+、食品科学与工程A等，与 历史类招生专业中的农林经济管理、风景园林等有一定关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业以会计学、金融学、法学（社会学类含法学）、风景园林、英语等为主，其 中会计学社会热度推荐、法学分化观望、风景园林平稳；河北省2026年高考总人数约609800人，历史类按近年占比约40%估算约245140人，较2025年历史类243714人略有增加；省 控线方面，历史类本科批从2021年454分波动上升至2025年477分；南京位于长三角，对河北历史类考生有一定吸引力；该校在河北省历史类招生人数相对较少（ 2025年46人），竞争格局较为稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次回稳趋势、2026年招生计划明显缩招（-13%）、河北省历史类考生小幅增加等因素，预计2026年历史 类最低录取位次将较2025年有所前移。缩招效应主导位次前移，但考生增加和学校层次稳定部分抵消缩招影响。预测2026年最低位次约3874名，区间3374–4374名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nanjing Agricultural University in Hebei Province's History Category were approximately 2907 → 3155 → 5049 → 4021 → 4170, with a notable backward shift in 2023 (5049), stabilization above 4000 in 2024–2025, and a baseline of about 4170 in 2025; the enrollment plan in Hebei's History Category was 38 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 46 in 2025; the 2026 plan is reduced to 40 (a decrease of 6 from 2025, a drop of about 13%), a significant contraction that will slightly ease competition and may move the ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 55th on the Soft Science main list, stable around 50th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 institutions; reputation has been stable and neutral in recent years; Douyin popularity is average (ranked 102nd); no significant admission gaps recorded; Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, etc., which have some relevance to History Category majors such as Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management, Landscape Architecture, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category majors mainly include Accounting, Finance, Law (Sociology Class includes Law), Landscape Architecture, English, etc., among which Accounting has social popularity recommendation, Law is divided and wait-and-see, Landscape Architecture is stable; the total number of Hebei Province 2026 Gaokao examinees is about 609,800, with History Category estimated at about 245,140 based on the recent proportion of about 40%, a slight increase from 243,714 in 2025; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025; Nanjing is located in the Yangtze River Delta, which has some attraction for Hebei History Category examinees; the school's enrollment in Hebei's History Category is relatively small (46 in 2025), with a stable competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the stabilization trend of rankings in 2024–2025, the significant enrollment contraction in 2026 (-13%), and the slight increase in Hebei History Category examinees, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the History Category in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025. The contraction effect dominates the ranking advance, but the increase in examinees and stable school level partially offset the contraction impact. Predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 3874, with a range of 3374–4374.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3374–4374, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors (Accounting, Finance) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (below 3374), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (about 4374), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors as a backup.
